title: Insolvency practitioner bulletin 9 (2025): changes when contacting the Members’ Voluntary Liquidation (MVL) team
body: "This bulletin tells you about the introduction of new guidance, for contacting HMRC’s Members’ Voluntary Liquidation (MVL) team.   The bulletin explains:   how the guidance works what it should be used for how it will improve the way insolvency practitioners interact with the MVL team   "
